description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker:latest image with the docker:dind service and define variables DOCKER_MYSQL_IMAGE, DOCKER_POSTGRES_IMAGE, DOCKER_YII2_PHP_IMAGE. Apply a global before_script that runs `apk add --no-cache git curl docker-compose`, `docker info`, and `cd tests`. Add a test stage containing the jobs: caching (only on tests/caching and tests/full, runs `export COMPOSE_FILE=docker-compose.yml:docker-compose.${CI_BUILD_NAME}.yml`, `docker-compose up --build -d`, `docker-compose run --rm php vendor/bin/phpunit -v --group caching --exclude db`), cubrid (only on tests/cubrid and tests/extra, runs `cd cubrid`, `docker-compose up --build -d`, `docker-compose run --rm php bash -c 'while [ true ]; do curl cubrid:1523; if [ $? == 56 ]; then break; fi; ((c++)) && ((c==20)) && break; sleep 3; done'`, `sleep 5`, `docker-compose run --rm php /project/vendor/bin/phpunit -v --group cubrid`), db (only on tests/mysql and tests/full, runs `docker-compose up --build -d`, `docker-compose run --rm php vendor/bin/phpunit -v --group db --exclude caching,mysql,pgsql,mssql,cubrid,oci`), mssql (only on tests/mssql and tests/extra, runs `cd mssql`, `docker-compose up --build -d`, `docker-compose run --rm php bash -c 'while [ true ]; do curl mssql:1433; if [ $? == 52 ]; then break; fi; ((c++)) && ((c==15)) && break; sleep 5; done'`, `sleep 3`, `docker-compose run --rm sqlcmd sh -c 'sqlcmd -S mssql -U sa -Q "CREATE DATABASE yii2test" -P Microsoft-12345'`, `docker-compose run --rm php vendor/bin/phpunit -v --group mssql`), mysql (only on tests/mysql and tests/full, runs `export COMPOSE_FILE=docker-compose.yml:docker-compose.${CI_BUILD_NAME}.yml`, `docker-compose up --build -d`, `docker-compose run --rm php bash -c "while ! curl mysql:3306; do ((c++)) && ((c==30)) && break; sleep 2; done"`, `docker-compose run --rm php vendor/bin/phpunit -v --group mysql`), pgsql (only on tests/pgsql and tests/full, runs `export COMPOSE_FILE=docker-compose.yml:docker-compose.${CI_BUILD_NAME}.yml`, `docker-compose up --build -d`, `docker-compose run --rm php bash -c 'while [ true ]; do curl postgres:5432; if [ $? == 52 ]; then break; fi; ((c++)) && ((c==25)) && break; sleep 2; done'`, `docker-compose run --rm php vendor/bin/phpunit -v --group pgsql`), and a generic test job (runs `docker-compose up --build -d`, `docker-compose run --rm php vendor/bin/phpunit -v --exclude caching,db,data --log-junit tests/_junit/test.xml`). Also add a travis stage with a travis job that runs only on the travis branch, executes `export COMPOSE_FILE=docker-compose.yml:docker-compose.mysql.yml:docker-compose.pgsql.yml`, `docker-compose up --build -d`, `sleep 10`, and `docker-compose run --rm php vendor/bin/phpunit -v --exclude mssql,cubrid,oci,wincache,xcache,zenddata,cubrid`. No artifacts, caches, or deployment targets are defined.
